title: Wire gold-standard F1 regression gate into CI
context: Accuracy is a safety property, so the gold standard is wired into CI as a regression gate that blocks merges that degrade structuring accuracy. It computes per-assertion F1 (concept + operator + value) against the double-reviewed gold set. It depends on the gold standard (004) and the rule extractor (102).
objective: Wire a gold-standard F1 regression test into CI that computes per-assertion F1 vs the double-reviewed gold set and fails the build below the target threshold.
acceptanceCriteria: Regression test computes per-assertion F1 (concept + operator + value) vs the double-reviewed gold standard.
CI fails the build when F1 falls below the release threshold (>= 0.85).
Runs deterministically from a clean clone; results reported in CI output.
No secrets or tokens written to logs.
